name: The Wendigo: Forest Protector
description:
Image cropped to fit the new guidelines!

Uhh look guys I can't really be bothered to write a whole ahh description. Basically it's a big docile Wendigo that loves the weak and hates aggressors. You either get loved or get attacked.

She also big as hell she like 9 feet tall because the bigger the mommy the more they dommy. Also she mute all you get is growl growl grunt sorry.

By 4ears 5eyes on R34

Sorry I decided I'm not doing Pumkat I've milked Halloween a bit too much already.
